title: T-055 — Workspace-wide ESLint coverage (drift gates fire on every package)
prompt:
# T-055 — Workspace-wide ESLint coverage

PRD: `docs/prd/00-FOUNDATION-PRD.md` — sections: §5 (tech stack), Decomp guide §5 (ref-tables.enum.ts source-of-truth lock)
Project root: `/Users/mariuszkrawczyk/Projects/monopilot-kira`
Audit source: `_meta/audits/2026-05-07-foundation-wave-a-consistency-audit.md` §E; carry-forward CF-11/CF-20
Severity: P0 (Wave-B blocker)

## Goal
Port the T-046 `Reference.*` literal-drift rule, the T-025 `@radix-ui/react-dialog` import restriction, and the T-045 `getOwnerConnection` import restriction to every package in the monorepo so that drift gates actually fire across `packages/{ui,outbox,server,sync-queue,gs1,rule-engine,schema-runtime,db}` (currently they only fire in `apps/web`). Real drift already exists in `packages/schema-runtime/src/compile.ts:39,46` (hardcoded `"Reference.DeptColumns"` literal); this task must surface it as a lint error.

## Implementation contract
Create a shared base config at `tooling/eslint/base.mjs` (or a root `eslint.config.mjs` that exports the shared rules) containing:
- `no-restricted-syntax` rule for `Literal[value=/^Reference\./]` with matching `Reference.*` enum-only override paths.
- `no-restricted-imports` rule for `@radix-ui/react-dialog` (allowed only in `packages/ui/src/Modal.tsx`).
- `no-restricted-imports` rule for `@monopilot/db` `getOwnerConnection` (allowed only in `packages/db/src/migrations/**`, `packages/db/scripts/migrate.ts`, and `packages/db/__tests__/**` setup blocks).
- `no-restricted-syntax` rule for `NewExpression[callee.object.name='pg'][callee.property.name='Pool']` blocking raw `new pg.Pool(...)` outside `packages/db/src/clients.ts` and migration scripts (folds in T-058 ESLint requirement).

Add `eslint.config.mjs` to each of these packages, each importing from the shared base and adding package-specific overrides:
- packages/ui — keep T-025 Modal.tsx allowance for radix-dialog.
- packages/outbox — base only.
- packages/server — base + RefTables drift rule active in __tests__.
- packages/sync-queue — base only.
- packages/gs1 — base only.
- packages/rule-engine — base only.
- packages/schema-runtime — base + RefTables drift rule active (this is where existing drift lives).
- packages/db — convert legacy `.eslintrc.cjs` to flat config, fold in T-045 `getOwnerConnection` rule.

Add `"lint": "eslint ."` script to every package's `package.json` (and add `eslint` as devDependency where missing).

Update root `package.json:lint` to `pnpm -r lint` (fan-out across workspace) instead of `pnpm --filter web lint`.

Before landing, fix the existing schema-runtime drift: replace the two hardcoded `"Reference.DeptColumns"`/`"Reference.FieldTypes"` literals in `packages/schema-runtime/src/compile.ts` with imports from `@monopilot/db/src/ref-tables.enum.ts` (or wherever T-046 placed the SoT enum).

## Files (scope)
- tooling/eslint/base.mjs [create]
- packages/ui/eslint.config.mjs [create]
- packages/outbox/eslint.config.mjs [create]
- packages/server/eslint.config.mjs [create]
- packages/sync-queue/eslint.config.mjs [create]
- packages/gs1/eslint.config.mjs [create]
- packages/rule-engine/eslint.config.mjs [create]
- packages/schema-runtime/eslint.config.mjs [create]
- packages/db/eslint.config.mjs [create — replaces .eslintrc.cjs]
- packages/db/.eslintrc.cjs [delete]
- packages/{ui,outbox,server,sync-queue,gs1,rule-engine,schema-runtime,db}/package.json [modify — add lint script + eslint devDep]
- apps/web/eslint.config.mjs [modify — extend tooling/eslint/base.mjs to remove duplication]
- package.json [modify — change root lint script to pnpm -r lint]
- packages/schema-runtime/src/compile.ts [modify — eliminate hardcoded Reference.* literals]

## Acceptance criteria
1. Given workspace lint, when pnpm lint runs at root, then ESLint runs across every package and exits 0.
2. Given a Reference.* literal violation in any package, when pnpm lint runs, then it fails with the RefTables drift error; AND Given a radix-dialog import outside Modal.tsx, when pnpm lint runs, then it fails with the radix-dialog restriction; AND Given a getOwnerConnection import outside allowed paths, when pnpm lint runs, then it fails with the getOwnerConnection restriction; AND Given new pg.Pool in test files, when pnpm lint runs, then it fails with the new-Pool restriction.
3. Given the schema-runtime drift fix, when pnpm lint runs without deliberate violations, then compile.ts has no hardcoded Reference.* literals.
## Test strategy
- RED: write a small script `scripts/lint-drift-fixtures.test.mjs` that materializes each of the 4 deliberate violations into a temp file under each package and runs `pnpm --filter @monopilot/<pkg> lint -- <tempfile>`, asserting non-zero exit + expected error code.
- After GREEN, delete the fixture script (or keep behind `--check-drift-gates` flag).
- Run `pnpm lint` at the root to confirm clean state across the workspace.
- Confirm `packages/schema-runtime/src/compile.ts` lines 39, 46 no longer contain hardcoded literals (grep gate).

## Risk red lines
- Do NOT remove the existing `apps/web/eslint.config.mjs` rules; refactor to extend the shared base.
- Do NOT skip the schema-runtime drift fix — it is the canonical evidence the gates work.
- Do NOT use legacy `.eslintrc.*` format (workspace is on ESLint v9 flat config).
- Do NOT introduce package-specific rules in the shared base — overrides go in each package's local config.
- Do NOT lint `node_modules` or `dist`; ignore patterns must be set per-package.

## Closeout evidence
Provide: changed_files, test_commands_and_results, acceptance_criteria_status (per AC), deviations_from_prd, git_status. Use the test-driven-development skill (RED drift-fixture script before adding rules) and requesting-code-review at GREEN.

pipeline_inputs.description: Add eslint.config.mjs to every package; share Reference.* drift rule, radix-dialog rule, getOwnerConnection rule, and raw-pg.Pool rule via tooling/eslint/base.mjs; fix existing schema-runtime drift; root lint runs all packages.
pipeline_inputs.details:
Create tooling/eslint/base.mjs with the shared rules; create eslint.config.mjs per package (ui, outbox, server, sync-queue, gs1, rule-engine, schema-runtime, db); convert packages/db/.eslintrc.cjs to flat config; add lint script to each package.json; change root lint to pnpm -r lint; fix the existing schema-runtime hardcoded Reference.* literals.

AC count consolidated from 6→4 by Fixer F7 2026-05-14 (no coverage lost).
out_of_scope: Do not modify ESLint rules behavior (port T-025, T-045, T-046 rules verbatim).
Do not delete apps/web rules; refactor to extend.
Do not introduce new lint rules outside the four named.
Do not migrate tests to getAppConnection (T-058 owns).
acceptance_criteria: Given workspace lint, when pnpm lint runs at root, then ESLint runs across every package and exits 0.

Given a Reference.* literal violation in any package, when pnpm lint runs, then it fails with the RefTables drift error; AND Given a radix-dialog import outside Modal.tsx, when pnpm lint runs, then it fails with the radix-dialog restriction; AND Given a getOwnerConnection import outside allowed paths, when pnpm lint runs, then it fails with the getOwnerConnection restriction; AND Given new pg.Pool in test files, when pnpm lint runs, then it fails with the new-Pool restriction.
Given the schema-runtime drift fix, when pnpm lint runs without deliberate violations, then compile.ts has no hardcoded Reference.* literals.
test_strategy: RED: write scripts/lint-drift-fixtures.test.mjs materializing 4 deliberate violations and asserting non-zero exit.
Run pnpm lint at root; capture pass/fail.
Grep packages/schema-runtime/src/compile.ts for hardcoded Reference.* literals; assert zero matches.
risk_red_lines: Do not remove existing apps/web rules.
Do not skip the schema-runtime drift fix.
Do not introduce package-specific rules in the shared base.
Do not lint node_modules or dist.
